# northern lights over snow-capped mountian

Amazing light display from Mother Nature, very humbled and in awe to capture a multi-hued color Aurora at Tromso, Norway.

A map markerTromsø, Norway

Calendar outlinedPublished on July 11, 2018CameraCanon, EOS 6DSafetyFree to use under the [Unsplash License](https://unsplash.com/license)
